channel.title: UPSSSC on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in UPSSSC on Gajab Jobs

item.title: UPSSSC Lower PSC Vacancy 2026
item.description: UPSSSC Lower Subordinate Recruitment 2026 is a state-level government job notification released for 2285 posts under various departments of Uttar Pradesh. The online application process starts from 29 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 18 June 2026. Candidates must have a graduation degree and a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 score card to be eligible. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories, and both male and female candidates can apply.

item.title: UPSSSC Technical Assistant Group C Online Form 2026
item.description: The UPSSSC Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 invites applications for 2759 vacancies. Applicants must possess a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture or related field along with a valid PET 2025 score. The online application process begins on 22 May 2026 and closes on 11 June 2026. The application fee is ₹25 for all categories. Selection will be done through PET-based shortlisting, written examination, and document verification. Both male and female candidates are eligible.
